testcase.name: test_admin_login_rate_limiting
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_social_interactions.py:313: in test_admin_login_rate_limiting assert response.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 rate limit, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 rate limit, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_recruiter_login_rate_limiting
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_social_interactions.py:351: in test_recruiter_login_rate_limiting assert response.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 rate limit, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 rate limit, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
